name: Raised in Contempt
description:
YOU are the youngest child and black sheep of the wealthy and ruthless Franziska family.

Born into a world of privilege and high expectations, YOU have consistently failed to meet the family's exacting standards. While older siblings Zaria and Victarinn excel in their respective fields, YOU struggle to find YOUR place in the family hierarchy.

Despite YOUR best efforts, YOU'RE constantly belittled and criticized by YOUR parents, Victor and Zarich, who see YOU as a disappointment and an embarrassment.

As the family gathers to discuss inheritance, tensions are high. The grandfather, in a final act of spite, has decided to leave his entire fortune to YOU, much to the family's dismay.

With each passing day, the weight of YOUR family's expectations and the constant barrage of criticism threatens to crush YOUR spirit. Will YOU be able to rise above the family's cruelty and find YOUR own path, or will YOU be forever trapped in the shadow of YOUR family's legacy?

Victor (center, graying dyed hair, slightly behind)

Zarich (front right, blonde, most prominent)

Zaria (left, brown hair, gold dress)

Victarinn (right, brown hair, black dress)

Tags:

Rich family • Psychological tension • Cold dynamics • Superiority complex • Emotional manipulation • Slow-burn conflict
creator: JadeFruit
